summary: Completed comprehensive testing of French welding training website with all 22 sections. All 7 new pages load correctly and existing functionality preserved.

design_issues.issue: One broken image detected on decoupe_laser page

All 7 new pages load correctly: CAO, Decoupe Laser, Decoupe Plasma, Pliage CNC, Marbres, Mecano-assemblage, Deformation

No CTT or SIGMA text found anywhere on the site
Direct links to alesium.fr, gracz.fr, claustra.gracz.fr exist in both footer and sidebar
Images load correctly on most key pages
Tables display correctly on Decoupe Laser page (2 tables found)
Pliage CNC page has correct V/thickness table with proper headers
All existing pages still work: SMAW, MIG/MAG, TIG, Tables with filters
Sidebar navigation functions properly with hash routing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix one broken image on Decoupe Laser page (minor issue)
